notes: Your setup profile now decides which tool tiles start enabled (nothing is removed — hidden tools stay in Manage tools). Index Archive Footage polished: the window can go behind the main window, shrinks back on collapse, and the describe queue's engine label tells the truth — failed describes stay pending. Editing fixes: Tag tool no longer freezes the app, project-only tools grey out without a project, Search & Import gains a search-scope picker, Triage card gets custom destinations + per-row Timeline checkbox, and YouTube metadata is grounded in vidIQ keyword data when connected.
